auth.resetLinkError: We couldn't send the reset link. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessDescription: Your password has been changed. You can sign in now.
auth.resetLinkInvalidDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

auth.registerCheckEmailSpamHint: If you don't see it in a few minutes, check your Spam or Junk folder.
auth.signupRateLimited: Too many signup attempts. Please try again in {seconds}s.
auth.captchaVerificationFailed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
auth.captchaHelp: Complete the security check to continue.
auth.canvasSubtitle: Build your AI-assisted WhatsApp workflow in minutes, not days.
auth.canvasPrompt: I want to book an appointment
auth.canvasScenario1Turn1User: Can I book a skincare appointment this week?
auth.canvasScenario1Turn1Agent: Yes, we have available slots this week. Which day works for you?
auth.canvasScenario1Turn2User: Wednesday evening works, can you reserve my spot?
auth.canvasScenario1Turn2Agent: Absolutely. I can reserve Wednesday evening. Please share your name and phone number.
auth.canvasScenario2Turn1User: Can you resend the receipt from my previous appointment?
auth.canvasScenario2Turn1Agent: Sure, I can forward this as a support request right away.
auth.canvasScenario2Turn2User: I do not need a new booking, only the document.
auth.canvasScenario2Turn2Agent: Understood. Your request has been forwarded to the support team.
auth.canvasScenario3Turn1User: We need an office team photo shoot for our company.
auth.canvasScenario3Turn1Agent: Great fit. We provide on-site corporate shooting and planning.
auth.canvasScenario3Turn2User: Can we schedule a planning call this week?
auth.canvasScenario3Turn2Agent: Yes, we can schedule it this week. Share your company email and I will send the details today.
auth.canvasSequence1Agent: Great fit. We have Starter and Pro packages. Want me to recommend the best one by budget?
auth.canvasSequence2Agent: Yes. We have 3 slots this week. Share your preferred day and I will reserve it.
auth.canvasSequence3User: Do you have a first-visit offer?
auth.canvasSequence3Agent: Yes. First visit gets 10% off. I can secure it now with your name and phone number.

banner.message: Your trial ends in {days} days on {date}. Upgrade now to avoid service interruption.
banner.mobileMessage: Your trial ends in {days} days on {date}. To avoid service interruption, upgrade now.

completionModal.title: Getting started is complete
completionModal.description: Qualy is now ready for live use. The bot is currently off. You can switch to shadow or active mode now, or keep it off for the moment.

active.title: Active
active.body: Replies to messages, runs lead extraction, and fully activates Qualy.

shadow.title: Shadow
shadow.body: Stores messages and runs lead extraction, but does not send replies.

off.title: Keep it off for now
off.body: Leaves the bot off. You can switch to shadow or active later.

recommendedBanner.title: We recommend doing this on a larger screen
recommendedBanner.body: Setup and review steps feel more comfortable on desktop.

intro.title: Get to know Qualy
intro.description: Qualy handles the first response, collects the right details, clarifies appointment flow early, and keeps high-priority conversations visible.

instantReplies.title: Never misses the first message
instantReplies.body: Customers get an answer quickly, even outside working hours.

leadInfo.title: Collects the right details
leadInfo.body: Qualy asks for the fields you actually need before follow-up.

appointments.title: Clarifies appointments early
appointments.body: It organizes service choice, timing, and core needs from the very beginning.

prioritization.title: Protects your priorities
prioritization.body: Conversations that need closer attention stay visible so you do not miss important opportunities.

agent_setup.title: Prepare your AI agent
agent_setup.description: Use Knowledge Base to describe your business, then use Skills to define precise replies and behaviors for repeated questions.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.body: Upload the business facts the AI can safely rely on.

skills.title: Skills
skills.body: Runs on very low credits; you define exactly what it says and leave little room for made-up answers.

availability.title: Safer launch
availability.body: A well-prepared agent reduces wrong answers before live traffic starts.

business_review.title: Review your business details
business_review.description: Review your service summary, required details, and service list. AI automatically extracts these fields from the documents you add to Knowledge Base. If you prefer, you can also enter or edit them manually.

checks.requiredInfo: Required customer information and intake fields

ai_settings_review.title: Review your Qualy AI settings
ai_settings_review.description: Adjust the bot name, reply behavior, and human handoff settings to fit how your business works.

botMode.title: Personalize the bot name
botMode.body: Update Qualy's visible name and bot note so they match your business.

responseLogic.title: Refine reply logic
responseLogic.body: Review the threshold, prompt, and response framing to keep answers on track.

handover.title: Confirm human handoff
handover.body: Decide when important conversations should be handed back to you.

connect_whatsapp.title: Connect your channels
connect_whatsapp.description: When you're ready, connect your channels and manage every new conversation from one place.

channelConnectionLocked.message: You can connect your channels after the getting started steps are complete.

Channels.whatsappComingSoon: WhatsApp integration coming soon! Contact support for early access.

whatsapp.description: Connect WhatsApp Business via Meta so Qualy can reply with AI and qualify leads from one shared inbox.

telegram.description: Connect your Telegram bot to capture new inquiries and answer messages in real time.

messenger.description: Connect Facebook Messenger when your Meta page messaging assets are ready for this workspace.

instagram.description: Connect Instagram direct messages so Qualy can reply with AI and qualify leads in the same inbox.

banner.message: Your trial ends in {days} days on {date}. Upgrade now to avoid service interruption.

checklist.title: Let's get Qualy ready before you connect WhatsApp.
checklist.subtitle: Follow this order once. Teach the AI first, review your business context, then connect the live channel last.

intro.title: Get to know Qualy
intro.description: Qualy handles the first response, collects the right details, clarifies appointment flow early, and keeps high-priority conversations visible.

instantReplies.title: Fast first response
instantReplies.body: Customers get an answer immediately, even outside working hours.

leadInfo.title: Collects the right details
leadInfo.body: Qualy asks for the fields you actually need before follow-up.

appointments.title: Clarifies appointments early
appointments.body: It organizes service choice, timing, and core needs from the very beginning.

prioritization.title: Protects your priorities
prioritization.body: Conversations that need closer attention stay visible so you do not miss important opportunities.

agent_setup.title: Set up your AI agent
agent_setup.description: Start with Knowledge Base so the agent knows your services, pricing logic, and common questions. Then review Skills to shape tone, constraints, and task-specific behavior.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.body: Upload the business facts the AI can safely rely on.

skills.title: Skills
skills.body: Control how the AI replies, what it asks, and when it leaves the conversation to you.

availability.title: Safer go-live
availability.body: A better-trained agent reduces wrong answers before WhatsApp traffic starts.

business_review.title: Review what AI should know about your business
business_review.description: Before going live, confirm the business profile that powers qualification: service summary, required intake fields, and service catalog. This keeps AI questions aligned with your workflow.

checks.requiredInfo: Required customer information and intake fields

connect_whatsapp.title: Connect WhatsApp last
connect_whatsapp.description: Once the agent and business context are ready, connect WhatsApp so live conversations start with the right setup instead of forcing rework after launch.

readyFirst.title: Teach the AI first
readyFirst.body: Knowledge, skills, and business rules should be ready before real traffic enters.

launchLast.title: Reduce setup churn
launchLast.body: Connecting the channel last avoids redoing copy, intake fields, and service context.

goLive.title: Go live with confidence
goLive.body: Your first WhatsApp conversations start with the same rules your team expects.

resources.whatsappOverview: Everything you need to know about WhatsApp Business Platform
resources.whatsappMigration: Migrate from WhatsApp Personal or WhatsApp Business App
resources.telegramOverview: Everything you need to know about Telegram bots
resources.instagramOverview: Everything you need to know about Instagram messaging
resources.messengerOverview: Learn more about Messenger customer chat

placeholder.comingSoon: This onboarding flow is not open for new workspaces yet. Use the resources on the left to prepare your assets first.
placeholder.connectedBanner: {channel} is already connected on this workspace.

whatsapp.sidebarDescription: Connect WhatsApp Business Platform so Qualy can answer with AI, qualify leads, and keep everything in one inbox.
whatsapp.supportBanner: Need help with connecting WhatsApp? Pick the right setup path first, then open Meta only when the account and number are ready.
whatsapp.heading: Connect WhatsApp Business Platform (API)
whatsapp.subheading: Start with the API path that matches your business today. If you already use the WhatsApp Business app, move into the migration flow instead of opening the wrong Meta setup.
whatsapp.connectedDescription: Your WhatsApp channel is already active. Use the actions below to manage templates, debug webhook health, or remove Qualy's connection without changing your WhatsApp Business setup.
whatsapp.connectedBanner: {name} is connected and ready to receive conversations.
whatsapp.pendingDescription: Your WhatsApp assets are attached, but webhook verification is still pending. Do not expect inbound conversations until Meta confirms the webhook callback.
whatsapp.pendingBanner: {name} is attached, but webhook verification is still pending.
whatsapp.errorDescription: Your WhatsApp assets are attached, but webhook setup needs attention before this channel can receive conversations reliably.
whatsapp.errorBanner: {name} needs webhook attention before it is ready.

telegram.sidebarDescription: Connect your Telegram bot to receive new conversations, answer instantly, and keep lead intake in the same inbox.
telegram.heading: Connect Telegram Bot
telegram.subheading: Start by creating a new bot or connecting an existing bot token from BotFather.
telegram.newDescription: If you do not have a bot yet, create one in BotFather first and paste the new token below.
telegram.existingDescription: If you already have a working Telegram bot, paste its token below to connect it to this workspace.
telegram.connectedDescription: Your Telegram bot is already active. You can check webhook health or disconnect it from this workspace.
telegram.connectedBanner: {name} is connected and ready to receive conversations.

instagram.sidebarDescription: Connect Instagram messaging so customer DMs flow directly into Qualy for AI response and lead qualification.
instagram.heading: Connect Instagram messaging
instagram.subheading: After clicking Connect with Instagram, you will be redirected to Instagram to select the account you want to connect and grant Partner permissions. Then, you're all set up and ready to go!
instagram.body: After clicking Continue with Instagram, choose the professional Instagram account you want to connect and approve permissions. When authorization completes, this channel becomes active for webhook intake and reactive replies.
instagram.connectedDescription: Your Instagram channel is already active. You can verify webhook health or disconnect it from this workspace.
instagram.connectedBanner: {name} is connected and ready to receive conversations.
instagram.pendingDescription: Your Instagram account is connected, but Qualy has not recorded webhook verification for this channel yet. This is separate from OAuth permissions, so treat the channel as not fully ready until webhook health is confirmed.
instagram.pendingBanner: {name} is connected, but webhook verification is still pending.
instagram.errorDescription: Your Instagram account is connected, but webhook health needs attention before this channel can receive conversations reliably.
instagram.errorBanner: {name} needs webhook attention before it is ready.

messenger.sidebarDescription: Prepare your Messenger business assets and website chat presence before onboarding opens for this workspace.
messenger.heading: Messenger onboarding
messenger.subheading: Messenger is listed here for discovery, but onboarding is not open on this workspace yet.
messenger.body: Messenger connect is still a placeholder in MVP. Use the resource on the left to understand the asset requirements and customer entry points before we open the channel.

templateTools.title: WhatsApp Templates
templateTools.description: This screen shows Meta WhatsApp templates only. It is separate from Qualy's regular saved messages.
templateTools.requirementBody: To use this feature, the channel must be connected to a WhatsApp Business Account (WABA). Templates are created and approved on Meta's side.
templateTools.noTemplates: No templates were found for this WhatsApp Business Account.
templateTools.bodyParamsHint: Enter one line per body variable in template order.
templateTools.validationTemplate: Please select a template with a valid language.
templateTools.guideDescription: Use this screen to restart messaging with a customer, especially when the 24-hour free-form window has expired. The templates shown here are Meta-approved WhatsApp templates.
templateTools.guideStep1: Click "Refresh templates" to load approved WhatsApp templates from your connected WABA.
templateTools.guideStep2: Choose a template and verify its language/status.
templateTools.guideStep3: Enter the recipient number with country code and no spaces (e.g. 905551112233).
templateTools.guideStep4: If the template has variables, enter one value per line in order.
templateTools.guideStep5: Click "Send template" and confirm the returned message ID in the success state.
templateTools.guideFooter: Note: This tool is only for WhatsApp template sends; it does not change Qualy's regular saved messages or automated bot runtime.

Channels.confirmDisconnectDesc: Are you sure you want to disconnect this channel? The bot will stop responding to messages.
Channels.connectTelegramHelpTitle: How to get your Bot Token:

connectTelegramSteps.step2: Send <newbot>/newbot</newbot> to create a new bot
connectTelegramSteps.step3: Copy the API token that looks like <tokenFormat>123456:ABC...</tokenFormat>

Channels.oauthConnectDescriptionInstagram: After clicking Connect with Instagram, you will be redirected to Instagram to select the account you want to connect and grant Partner permissions. Then, you're all set up and ready to go!
Channels.oauthConnectDescription: You'll be redirected to Meta to authorize this channel connection. After approval, you'll return here automatically.

oauthStatus.missingWhatsAppAssets: No WhatsApp business phone number was found for this account. Check your Meta Business assets and permissions.
oauthStatus.missingInstagramAssets: No Instagram business account was found for this user. Check Page and Instagram linkage.
oauthStatus.orgMismatch: Connection session mismatch detected. Please retry from Channels.
oauthStatus.forbidden: You do not have permission to connect channels for this organization.
oauthStatus.missingMetaEnv: Meta app settings are incomplete on the server.
oauthStatus.invalidState: Meta connection state is invalid or expired. Please retry.
oauthStatus.missingCode: Meta did not return an authorization code. Please retry.
oauthStatus.genericFailure: Meta connection could not be completed.

oauthErrors.missingPermissions: Missing required Meta permissions for this app/user.
oauthErrors.invalidRedirectUri: Redirect URI is not allowed in Meta app settings.
oauthErrors.assetAccessDenied: User does not have access to required business assets.

whatsappConnect.choosePathDescription: Choose the setup path that matches your business. Most businesses should start with guided Meta setup, not the legacy asset flow.
whatsappConnect.businessAppPrompt: Need to connect WhatsApp Business App?
whatsappConnect.embeddedSignupUnavailable: Guided WhatsApp setup is not configured yet on this workspace. Finish Meta Embedded Signup setup first or use the legacy asset flow only if your Meta Cloud API assets are already ready.
whatsappConnect.existingEmbeddedSignupUnavailable: Current-number WhatsApp setup is not configured yet on this workspace. Add a dedicated Meta Embedded Signup config for existing WhatsApp Business numbers or continue with assisted setup.
whatsappConnect.embeddedSignupCancelled: WhatsApp setup was cancelled before completion.
whatsappConnect.embeddedSignupCancelledStep: WhatsApp setup was cancelled at step: {step}.
whatsappConnect.confirmDisconnectTitle: Remove this WhatsApp channel from Qualy?
whatsappConnect.confirmDisconnectDesc: This only removes this channel from Qualy. It does not disconnect your WhatsApp Business app, phone number, or Meta/WABA setup. The bot will stop responding to new messages here.
whatsappConnect.disconnectFailed: Failed to remove the WhatsApp channel from Qualy. Please try again.
whatsappConnect.retryVerificationSuccess: Webhook subscription was requested again. Send a fresh WhatsApp message from another number; the channel will flip to ready when the first valid webhook arrives.

newApi.title: Start with a new number
newApi.description: Choose this if you are setting up WhatsApp Business Platform (API) from scratch with a brand-new number.

existingApi.title: Connect an existing WhatsApp API account
existingApi.description: Choose this if your number and WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) already exist in Meta.

businessApp.title: Connect my WhatsApp Business number
businessApp.description: This is usually the right option if you actively use WhatsApp Business on your phone and that number is not connected through a WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) yet.

existingApi.heading: Connect WhatsApp Business Platform (API)
existingApi.description: Choose how you want to connect to WhatsApp Business Platform (API).

metaAssets.title: An existing WhatsApp Business Platform (API) account in Meta
metaAssets.description: Select this option if your WhatsApp Business Account and phone number already exist in Meta and you only need to connect those assets to Qualy.

otherBsp.title: An existing WhatsApp Business Platform (API) account from another BSP
otherBsp.description: Select this option if your account is currently managed by another WhatsApp Business Solution Provider and you want to migrate it to Qualy.

eligibility.heading: Let's Get Started With A Simple Eligibility Check
eligibility.question: Do you have a valid phone number that can send and receive SMS? You will need a phone number to connect WhatsApp Business Platform (API).

choices.newNumber: I have a new phone number (not tied to any WhatsApp account)
choices.personalAccount: I have a phone number tied to a WhatsApp Personal Account
choices.noNewNumber: I do not have a new number

migrationWarning.description: To use a phone number currently linked to a WhatsApp Personal Account or WhatsApp Business App with the WhatsApp Business Platform (API), you'll need to disconnect that number from the WhatsApp app first. Before doing so, back up chat history if you need to keep those conversations.
migrationWarning.linkLabel: Learn how to migrate from WhatsApp Personal Account or WhatsApp Business App.
migrationWarning.secondary: I will use a new number instead

metaAccess.heading: Let's Confirm Your Meta Business Manager Access
metaAccess.description: Do you have access to the Meta Business Manager account associated with your company? If you do not have one yet, you can create it during the connection process.
metaAccess.checklistTitle: Good to know - You will need the following information to create a WhatsApp Business Account (WABA):

checklist.step1: The name of your company as customers should see it.

businessApp.heading: Connect your WhatsApp Business number
businessApp.description: Use this flow to connect the WhatsApp Business number you already use on your phone. If it is not connected through a WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) yet, this is usually the right path.

connectReady.heading: Connect WhatsApp Business Platform (API)
connectReady.description: After clicking Connect with Facebook, you will be redirected to Facebook to select the account you want to connect. Follow the instructions to create, set up, and configure your WhatsApp Business Platform (API). Once completed, you will be redirected back to this page.

whatsappConnect.existingDescriptionLong: Meta may ask you to confirm setup from the main phone and complete business portfolio steps during signup. This path is for existing WhatsApp Business numbers.

existingChecklist.step1: The number is actively used in WhatsApp Business app.
existingChecklist.step2: The main phone has the latest WhatsApp Business app version installed.
existingChecklist.step3: You can scan a QR code or confirm setup from that primary device during onboarding.
existingChecklist.step4: You can create or select a Meta business portfolio during signup if Meta asks for it.

whatsappConnect.newDescriptionLong: Use guided Meta setup to create the required WhatsApp Business assets and register the new number in one flow.

newChecklist.step1: Use a phone number that is not currently active in another WhatsApp account.
newChecklist.step2: Keep access to SMS or voice verification for that number.
newChecklist.step3: Be ready to create or select a Meta business portfolio during setup.

whatsappConnect.assetsDescriptionLong: After clicking Connect with Facebook, you will be redirected to Meta to select the existing account you want to connect. Use this path only when your WhatsApp Business Account and phone number are already present in Meta.

assetsChecklist.step1: You already have a WhatsApp Business Account in Meta.
assetsChecklist.step2: That WABA already has a phone number connected and visible to your Meta user.
assetsChecklist.step3: You only need this app to discover and connect those existing assets.

bspMigration.heading: Migrate your WhatsApp Business Platform (API) account
bspMigration.description: To proceed with the migration, ensure that you have understood the requirements.
bspMigration.banner: Your display name, quality rating, messaging limits, Official Business Account status, and any approved high-quality message templates will be migrated.

requirements.twoStepBody: Before you migrate, disable two-step verification for the WhatsApp number in Meta Business Manager or with your current provider if they control that setting.
requirements.verificationTitle: Your current business is verified and the WhatsApp assets are approved
requirements.verificationBody: Make sure the current business verification, phone number display name, and WABA approval state are all in good standing before you continue.
requirements.popupsBody: The Meta migration flow opens in a pop-up window. If your browser blocks pop-ups, the migration cannot continue.

connectWhatsAppSteps.step1: Create a WhatsApp app in Meta Developers and copy the Phone Number ID + Business Account ID.
connectWhatsAppSteps.step2: Generate a permanent access token with WhatsApp messaging permissions.
connectWhatsAppSteps.step3: Set an app secret and verify token. Use the same verify token in the webhook configuration.

connectInstagramSteps.step1: Switch your Instagram account to a professional account (Business or Creator).
connectInstagramSteps.step2: In Meta Developers > Instagram API with Instagram Login, enable required permissions: instagram_business_basic, instagram_business_manage_messages, instagram_business_manage_comments.
connectInstagramSteps.step3: Set your webhook callback URL and verify token, then authorize the account with Continue with Instagram.

billingPlans.description: Choose your monthly package and buy one-time credits when needed.
billingPlans.noOrganizationDesc: You need to be part of an organization to manage plans.

status.title: Current plan
status.description: See your plan and remaining credits.
status.creditPriorityTopupFirst: Usage priority: extra credits first, then monthly package
status.nonActiveMembershipNote: Plan is not active. Continue with a package action below.

packageCatalog.title: Monthly packages
packageCatalog.description: Pick the monthly package that fits your business.
packageCatalog.currentPackageInactive: You do not have an active monthly package yet.
packageCatalog.assumption: Conversation ranges are estimates and can change based on message length and usage style.

manager.title: Manage subscription
manager.description: Upgrades apply immediately. Lower-tier changes start at period end. When you cancel, auto-renew turns off and the plan stays active until the current period ends.
manager.cancelScheduledWithDate: Cancellation scheduled. Your plan stays active until {date}.
manager.cancelScheduledNoDate: Cancellation scheduled. Your plan stays active until the current period ends.
manager.resumeUnavailable: After Iyzico turns auto-renew off, you can't turn it back on from inside the app. Subscribe again when the period ends if needed.
manager.pendingPlanNoDate: Upcoming plan: {plan}. Effective at next billing period.

planModal.title: Manage plan
planModal.description: Review your current package, upgrade, or switch for the next billing period.
planModal.downgradeContinue: Select this plan (period end) and continue
planModal.downgradeHint: Lower-tier changes apply at period end.

cancelModal.title: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
cancelModal.descriptionWithDate: When you confirm, auto-renew will be turned off. Your plan will remain active until {date}.
cancelModal.descriptionNoDate: When you confirm, auto-renew will be turned off. Your plan will remain active until the current period ends.

packageCatalog.downgradeHiddenHint: Downgrades are scheduled from plan management and apply at period end.

planManagement.title: Plan management
planManagement.description: If you move to a lower package, the change starts after the current billing period ends.
planManagement.pendingNoDate: {plan} will start at the beginning of the next billing period.
planManagement.pendingUnknown: A lower package change is scheduled for the next period.

customPackage.title: Need more credits?
customPackage.description: If you need higher limits or a custom package, let's talk and shape a plan for your business.

renewalCard.title: Subscription management
renewalCard.description: You can turn auto-renew off here. The plan stays active until the current period ends.
renewalCard.onHint: Your package renews automatically at period end.
renewalCard.offHintWithDate: Your package stays active until {date}. After that, it will not auto-renew.
renewalCard.offHintNoDate: Your package stays active until the end of the current period. After that, it will not auto-renew.

packageCatalog.manageHint: You can change plans directly from this page. For custom billing needs,
packageCatalog.footnote: Conversation ranges are guidance values. Actual usage may vary.

topups.sectionDescription: When credits run low, continue with a one-time credit purchase.

topups.oneTimeNotice: Extra credits are one-time purchases and do not auto-renew.
topups.unavailable: Top-up packages are unavailable right now.

modal.title: Select a credit package

checkoutLegal.title: Pre-payment confirmation
checkoutLegal.description: Review the documents below and complete the required confirmations before you continue to the Iyzico payment screen.

checkoutLegal.acceptImmediateStart: I want the digital service to become available right after payment is completed.
checkoutLegal.acceptPlanChange: I want the plan change to be applied according to the details above.

details.effectiveNextPeriod: Applies at the start of the next billing period.
details.chargeProviderCalculated: The exact amount is not shown at this step. Any charge is processed with the saved payment method under Iyzico subscription rules.
details.chargeNoCharge: No new charge is taken today. The new price starts next period.
details.chargeFullPrice: The first subscription payment of {price} is charged today.

actions.adminLocked: This organization is admin-locked. Billing actions are blocked.

actions.topupRequiresPremium: Top-ups require an active monthly package.
actions.topupAfterPackageExhausted: Top-ups require an active monthly package.

renewalStatus.successCancel: Auto-renew has been turned off. Your plan stays active until the current period ends.

errors.notAvailable: This subscription-management action is not available in this environment.

billingUsage.calendarNote: Monthly usage is based on the calendar month.
billingUsage.detailsDescription: Review credit usage with simple operation names.
billingUsage.documentProcessingLabel: Content processing (indexing + service profile + required info)
billingUsage.messageUsageDescription: Track AI, operator, and inbound customer message volume.
billingUsage.storageUsageDescription: Approximate storage used by Skills, Knowledge Base, and inbound WhatsApp media.
billingUsage.noOrganizationDesc: You need to be part of an organization to view usage.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.description: Tune how the bot responds when it can’t find a Skill or Knowledge Base match.
aiSettings.botModeDescription: Applies to Telegram/WhatsApp/Instagram. Simulator is unaffected.
aiSettings.botModeActiveDescription: Bot replies to messages (Skills → KB → fallback).
aiSettings.botModeOffDescription: No AI processing; only messages are stored.
aiSettings.botModeLockedByOnboarding: You can change bot mode after the getting started steps are complete.
aiSettings.botModeLockedByOnboardingProgress: You can change bot mode after the getting started steps are complete.
aiSettings.operatorLeadExtractionDescription: Control whether lead extraction continues when an operator takes over.
aiSettings.operatorLeadExtractionLabel: Keep lead extraction running during operator takeover
aiSettings.operatorLeadExtractionHelp: Replies remain disabled; only lead extraction runs.
aiSettings.hotLeadScoreHelp: Escalate when lead extraction score is this value or higher.
aiSettings.humanEscalationActionNotifyOnlyHelp: Notify the team and keep AI active.
aiSettings.humanEscalationActionSwitchOperatorHelp: Lock conversation to operator and pause AI replies.
aiSettings.humanEscalationMessageHelp: Shown for the active UI language (English/Turkish) and used for skill-triggered handover.
aiSettings.botNameDescription: Shown to users and used in AI responses.
aiSettings.botDisclaimerDescription: Add a short AI disclaimer under bot replies across all channels.
aiSettings.botDisclaimerHelp: Sent as a quoted line (`> ...`) after one empty line.
aiSettings.botDisclaimerPlaceholder: This message was generated by an AI bot and may contain mistakes.
aiSettings.thresholdDescription: Applies to both Skills and Knowledge Base matching. Higher = stricter match (fewer replies). Lower = looser match (more replies).
aiSettings.promptDescription: If no Skill or Knowledge Base match is found, the bot will respond using the prompt below.
aiSettings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
aiSettings.noOrganizationDesc: You need to be part of an organization to manage AI settings.
aiSettings.offeringProfileDescription: Summarize what you offer so lead extraction can match fit even without a catalog.

aiQaLab.description: Manually trigger simulator-only QA runs. Generator and Judge roles are configured with separate instructions.
aiQaLab.readOnlyMode: Read-only impersonation mode cannot start QA runs.
aiQaLab.roleRestricted: Only organization owners or admins can start QA runs.
aiQaLab.startRunError: Could not queue the QA run. Please try again.
aiQaLab.enqueueRunSuccess: QA run started. It is running in the background.
aiQaLab.enqueueRunError: Could not queue the QA run. Please try again.
aiQaLab.scenarioDefinition: Scenario: one synthetic customer conversation case.
aiQaLab.turnDefinition: Turn: one customer message and one assistant response step.
aiQaLab.usageSummaryTooltip:
Averages are calculated from shown runs.
Average per run: {perRun} credits/run
Average per scenario: {perScenario} credits/scenario
Average per turn: {perTurn} credits/turn
Scenario: one synthetic customer conversation case.
Turn: one customer message and one assistant response step.
aiQaLab.costFormulaTooltip: Estimated with gpt-4o-mini pricing: input $0.15/M, cached input $0.075/M, output $0.60/M tokens.
aiQaLab.emptyRuns: No runs yet. Start a Quick run to generate the first report shell.

quick.title: Quick
quick.description: 15 scenarios, 6 turns per scenario, 100k token cap.

regression.description: 15 scenarios, 6 turns per scenario, 100k token cap.

aiQaLab.noOrganizationDesc: You need to be part of an organization to use AI QA Lab.

details.notFoundDescription: The selected QA run could not be found in the active organization context.
details.budgetStoppedNotice: Token budget was exhausted before all steps completed.
details.pipelineChecksDescription: System-generated stage checks to verify the run followed the expected order and logical progression.
details.scenarioAssessmentsDescription: Each scenario is evaluated in isolation for answer quality, logic flow, and groundedness.
details.pipelineActionSetDescription: Automatically normalized action list from Judge findings and top actions.
details.pipelineActionSetEmpty: No actionable pipeline recommendations were generated.
details.intakeCoverageDescription: Tracks whether required lead info is collected for both AI response quality and human handoff readiness.

organizationSettings.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface.
organizationSettings.billingRegionDescription: Select region for package currency. Turkey shows TRY, non-TR regions show USD.
organizationSettings.aiControlDescription: When enabled, both the offering profile and required fields are generated and updated from AI suggestions.
organizationSettings.offeringProfileDescription: Summarize what you offer so lead extraction can match fit even without a catalog.

organizationSettings.offeringProfilePlaceholder: Example: We provide newborn shoots, maternity sessions, and family packages. We do not offer individual headshots.
organizationSettings.offeringProfileAiToggleHelp: When enabled, the system generates new service suggestions from your Skills and Knowledge Base content.
organizationSettings.offeringProfileManualAddHelp: This text is stored as a separate profile note. It does not become a suggestion card.

google.title: Google Calendar
google.description: Use Google Calendar as an optional busy-time layer. Qualy remains the source of truth.
google.modeWriteThrough: Google busy-time check and mirroring are enabled.
google.modeBusyOverlay: Only Google busy-time checking is enabled.
google.help: The connected calendar is only a supporting layer; the authoritative booking record still lives in Qualy.

googleStatus.missing_org: Select an active organization before starting Google Calendar setup.

settings.title: Calendar settings
settings.description: Define the rules that Qualy and operators must respect before suggesting or creating appointments.
settings.bookingSectionDescription: Control whether booking is active, which time zone is used, and the core timing rules for new appointments.
settings.bookingEnabledHelp: When disabled, the system stops suggesting and creating new bookings.

fieldHints.slotInterval: Available times are offered to customers in these minute increments.
fieldHints.minimumNotice: Sets how far in advance a booking must be from the current moment.
fieldHints.bufferBefore: Automatically reserves prep time before each booking.
fieldHints.bufferAfter: Automatically leaves recovery or note-taking time after each booking.

settings.googleBusyOverlayHelp: Busy ranges from Google Calendar are included in availability checks.
settings.googleWriteThrough: Mirror created and updated bookings to Google
settings.googleWriteThroughHelp: Bookings created in Qualy are also written to Google Calendar.
settings.help: This module keeps a controlled v1 boundary: Qualy is authoritative and Google Calendar stays supportive.
settings.connectionDescription: This page only shows connection status inside calendar preferences. Manage Google Calendar connectivity and sync behavior from Applications.
settings.connectionDisconnected: There is no connected Google Calendar account yet.

apps.googleDescription: Manage external calendar apps from here. Google Calendar is first, and other applications can join this surface later.
apps.googleComingSoonDescription: Google Calendar is coming soon. Once it is available, you will manage busy-time checks and write-through behavior here.
apps.googleDisconnected: Google Calendar is not connected yet. Once connected, you can manage busy-time checks and write-through behavior here.

availability.help: Bookings outside these hours stay unavailable for both operators and AI.

availability.dayClosed: Appointments are blocked on this day

services.help: Leave a duration blank to keep the organization default.

bookingForm.validationSlotUnavailable: That time is no longer available. Choose another slot.
bookingForm.validationConflict: That time overlaps with another booking. Choose a different slot.
